TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-pear-story-3
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pan to moso la cihi ci mo no mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova eh mo alʉ na'no euho'a 'o isi toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: pan to moso ɗa ʦihi ʦi mo no mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova eh mo aɗɨ naʔno euhoʔa ʔo isi toai ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: pan to moso la cihi ci mo no mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova eh mo alʉ na'no euho'a 'o isi toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: pan to moso ɗa ʦihi ʦi mo no mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova eh mo aɗɨ naʔno euhoʔa ʔo isi toai ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人採梨子.他採的那棵梨樹結實纍纍.
There was one...one man that gathered pears. The pear tree from which he gathered pears was well-fruited.

S.FORM: eh ne osi cu pemomoun'a toepʉnga eh micu asonʉ peeueusno khago 'o isi toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: eh ne osi ʦu pemomounʔa toepɨŋa eh miʦu asonɨ peeueusno kha*o ʔo isi toai ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: eh ne osi cu pemomoun'a toepʉnga eh micu asonʉ peeueusno khago 'o isi toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: eh ne osi ʦu pemomounʔa toepɨŋa eh miʦu asonɨ peeueusno kha*o ʔo isi toai ʦi nasi.

TRANSL.notes: 當他幾乎要(採)完的時候,已經採了幾乎兩個籃子.

S.TRANSL: 當他幾乎要 完的時候,已經採了幾乎兩個籃子.

TRANSL.notes: When he almost finished (gathering pears), the pears that were gathered almost made two baskets...

S.TRANSL: When he almost finished , the pears that were gathered almost made two baskets...

S.FORM: eh mo 'ene 'enepio ci 'a'ausna 'o isi aiti.
S.PHON: eh mo ʔene ʔenepio ʦi ʔaʔausna ʔo isi aiti.
S.FORM: eh mo 'ene 'enepio ci 'a'ausna 'o isi aiti.
S.PHON: eh mo ʔene ʔenepio ʦi ʔaʔausna ʔo isi aiti.
S.TRANSL: 看到的情況有許多.
Several things/situations were seen/observed.

S.FORM: 'e mo coni pan to moso cihi ci mo sucaefi ci mo e'tʉ to moatʉ'nʉ ci eatatiskova mo sucaifi ho uk'a ci isi na'na u na'na hioa.
S.PHON: ʔe mo ʦoni pan to moso ʦihi ʦi mo suʦaefi ʦi mo eʔtɨ to moatɨʔnɨ ʦi eatatiskova mo suʦaifi ho ukʔa ʦi isi naʔna u naʔna hioa.
S.FORM: 'e mo coni pan to moso cihi ci mo sucaefi ci mo e'tʉ to moatʉ'nʉ ci eatatiskova mo sucaifi ho uk'a ci isi na'na u na'na hioa.
S.PHON: ʔe mo ʦoni pan to moso ʦihi ʦi mo suʦaefi ʦi mo eʔtɨ to moatɨʔnɨ ʦi eatatiskova mo suʦaifi ho ukʔa ʦi isi naʔna u naʔna hioa.

TRANSL.notes: (首先),有一個人牽著一隻羊經過,沒(什麼)事發生/(他)沒做(什麼)事.

S.TRANSL: ,有一個人牽著一隻羊經過,沒 事發生/ 沒做 事.

TRANSL.notes: (First), there was one man passing by pulling a goat, and nothing happened/was done (by him).

S.TRANSL: , there was one man passing by pulling a goat, and nothing happened/was done .

S.FORM: eh cu aomane pan to mo cihi ci oko mo moneo to jidensa ho maezo sucaefi.
S.PHON: eh ʦu aomane pan to mo ʦihi ʦi oko mo moneo to ji*ensa ho maezo suʦaefi.
S.FORM: eh cu aomane pan to mo cihi ci oko mo moneo to jidensa ho maezo sucaefi.
S.PHON: eh ʦu aomane pan to mo ʦihi ʦi oko mo moneo to ji*ensa ho maezo suʦaefi.
S.TRANSL: 過了不久,有一個小孩也騎著腳踏車經過.
A while later/after that, a boy on a bike passed by, too.

S.FORM: 'e oko eni isi aiti ho mo na'no man'i 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci nasi.
S.PHON: ʔe oko eni isi aiti ho mo naʔno manʔi ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: 'e oko eni isi aiti ho mo na'no man'i 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci nasi.
S.PHON: ʔe oko eni isi aiti ho mo naʔno manʔi ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩看到許多梨子在地上.
This child saw plenty of pears which are on the ground.

S.FORM: micu tosvo ho isi iu'i'ia ho aiti.
S.PHON: miʦu tosvo ho isi iuʔiʔia ho aiti.
S.FORM: micu tosvo ho isi iu'i'ia ho aiti.
S.PHON: miʦu tosvo ho isi iuʔiʔia ho aiti.

TRANSL.notes: (因此),他停下來仔細看(那些梨子).

S.TRANSL: ,他停下來仔細看 .

TRANSL.notes: (Therefore), he stopped to check carefully and see (the fruit).

S.TRANSL: , he stopped to check carefully and see .

S.FORM: eh mo asonʉ maica na to'tohʉngʉ ta oko mo mici meo'eoi.
S.PHON: eh mo asonɨ maiʦa na toʔtohɨŋɨ ta oko mo miʦi meoʔeoi.
S.FORM: eh mo asonʉ maica na to'tohʉngʉ ta oko mo mici meo'eoi.
S.PHON: eh mo asonɨ maiʦa na toʔtohɨŋɨ ta oko mo miʦi meoʔeoi.

TRANSL.notes: 那小孩的想法或許是想要偷(那些梨子)

S.TRANSL: 那小孩的想法或許是想要偷

TRANSL.notes: The thought of the child was probably like that he intended to steal (them).

S.TRANSL: The thought of the child was probably like that he intended to steal .

S.FORM: at'inghi isi ake'a zou aiti na 'e mo noepe ta evi ho toa nasi ci i himnonu.
S.PHON: atʔiŋhi isi akeʔa zou aiti na ʔe mo noepe ta evi ho toa nasi ʦi i himnonu.
S.FORM: at'inghi isi ake'a zou aiti na 'e mo noepe ta evi ho toa nasi ci i himnonu.
S.PHON: atʔiŋhi isi akeʔa zou aiti na ʔe mo noepe ta evi ho toa nasi ʦi i himnonu.
S.TRANSL: 但是他看了一下主人,他還在上面採梨子.
But he slightly saw the owner, who was staying above the tree picking pears.

S.FORM: eh mo ake'i ngoheʉngʉ nte aueu mici maeo ta mo c'o 'enepio ho hafa pkaako.
S.PHON: eh mo akeʔi ŋoheɨŋɨ nte aueu miʦi maeo ta mo ʦʔo ʔenepio ho hafa pkaako.
S.FORM: eh mo ake'i ngoheʉngʉ nte aueu mici maeo ta mo c'o 'enepio ho hafa pkaako.
S.PHON: eh mo akeʔi ŋoheɨŋɨ nte aueu miʦi maeo ta mo ʦʔo ʔenepio ho hafa pkaako.
S.TRANSL: 他有一點害怕,想要先拿走一些就離開.
He was somehow/a little bit afraid, and intended to take only a small part of them first and escaped.

S.FORM: at'inghi isi ait 'e mot toa nasi ci eatatiskova ho a'a mo a'a isi na'na zou aiti na 'e 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci isi cu toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: atʔiŋhi isi ait ʔe mot toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova ho aʔa mo aʔa isi naʔna zou aiti na ʔe ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi isi ʦu toai ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: at'inghi isi ait 'e mot toa nasi ci eatatiskova ho a'a mo a'a isi na'na zou aiti na 'e 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci isi cu toai ci nasi.
S.PHON: atʔiŋhi isi ait ʔe mot toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova ho aʔa mo aʔa isi naʔna zou aiti na ʔe ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi isi ʦu toai ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 但是他發現採梨子的人沒在看那些採好放在地上的梨子.
Yet he noticed that the pear-picking man wasn't paying much attention to/looking carefully after the gathered pears on the ground.

S.FORM: ko'ko eno 'e oko mo atavei alʉ moezʉ cono khago 'o isi zou isi peo'eoza ho hafa eh mo'unu maita'e.
S.PHON: koʔko eno ʔe oko mo atavei aɗɨ moezɨ ʦono kha*o ʔo isi zou isi peoʔeoza ho hafa eh moʔunu maitaʔe.
S.FORM: ko'ko eno 'e oko mo atavei alʉ moezʉ cono khago 'o isi zou isi peo'eoza ho hafa eh mo'unu maita'e.
S.PHON: koʔko eno ʔe oko mo atavei aɗɨ moezɨ ʦono kha*o ʔo isi zou isi peoʔeoza ho hafa eh moʔunu maitaʔe.
S.TRANSL: 因此,小孩最後直接偷走了一籃梨子,就那樣走了.

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, the child finally stole one basket (of the pears) straightforward, took it away, and went in some direction. (It was something) like that (way).

S.TRANSL: Therefore, the child finally stole one basket straightforward, took it away, and went in some direction. like that .

S.FORM: eh ne mohcu mi ta ceonʉ 'e oko ntesi a'a is cohivi ntesi hafa'uvo.
S.PHON: eh ne mohʦu mi ta ʦeonɨ ʔe oko ntesi aʔa is ʦohivi ntesi hafaʔuvo.
S.FORM: eh ne mohcu mi ta ceonʉ 'e oko ntesi a'a is cohivi ntesi hafa'uvo.
S.PHON: eh ne mohʦu mi ta ʦeonɨ ʔe oko ntesi aʔa is ʦohivi ntesi hafaʔuvo.

TRANSL.notes: 當那小孩走在路上,他不知道要(將梨子)帶到哪裡去.

S.TRANSL: 當那小孩走在路上,他不知道要 帶到哪裡去.

TRANSL.notes: When the child was walking on the road, he didn't know where he would carry (the pears).

S.TRANSL: When the child was walking on the road, he didn't know where he would carry .

S.FORM: a ne micu mi ta ceonʉ isi zou hafa na 'e 'e isi peo'eoza ci nasi.
S.PHON: a ne miʦu mi ta ʦeonɨ isi zou hafa na ʔe ʔe isi peoʔeoza ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: a ne micu mi ta ceonʉ isi zou hafa na 'e 'e isi peo'eoza ci nasi.
S.PHON: a ne miʦu mi ta ʦeonɨ isi zou hafa na ʔe ʔe isi peoʔeoza ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 他走在路上,帶著他偷來的梨子.
When he was on his way, carrying the stolen pears,

S.FORM: ho aʉlʉ eupte'lʉ to mo cihi ci mo hmʉhmʉskʉ ci mamespingi.
S.PHON: ho aɨɗɨ eupteʔɗɨ to mo ʦihi ʦi mo hmɨhmɨskɨ ʦi mamespiŋi.
S.FORM: ho aʉlʉ eupte'lʉ to mo cihi ci mo hmʉhmʉskʉ ci mamespingi.
S.PHON: ho aɨɗɨ eupteʔɗɨ to mo ʦihi ʦi mo hmɨhmɨskɨ ʦi mamespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 他碰巧遇見一個跟他一樣的女孩.

TRANSL.notes: (he) happened to meet a girl who is similar with him.

S.TRANSL: happened to meet a girl who is similar with him.

S.FORM: na 'e hahocngʉ isi asona na'na huaca huseolʉa 'e mamespingi.
S.PHON: na ʔe hahoʦŋɨ isi asona naʔna huaʦa huseoɗɨa ʔe mamespiŋi.
S.FORM: na 'e hahocngʉ isi asona na'na huaca huseolʉa 'e mamespingi.
S.PHON: na ʔe hahoʦŋɨ isi asona naʔna huaʦa huseoɗɨa ʔe mamespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩或許在喜歡那女孩.

TRANSL.notes: (and) probably liked the girl.

S.TRANSL: probably liked the girl.

S.FORM: ko'ko eno ne moso no eon ta jidensa o'a isi iu'i'ia 'e ntesi mia ci ceonʉ micu atavei smoftongʉ ta fatu ho ho oefʉ'ʉ.
S.PHON: koʔko eno ne moso no eon ta ji*ensa oʔa isi iuʔiʔia ʔe ntesi mia ʦi ʦeonɨ miʦu atavei smoftoŋɨ ta fatu ho ho oefɨʔɨ.
S.FORM: ko'ko eno ne moso no eon ta jidensa o'a isi iu'i'ia 'e ntesi mia ci ceonʉ micu atavei smoftongʉ ta fatu ho ho oefʉ'ʉ.
S.PHON: koʔko eno ne moso no eon ta ji*ensa oʔa isi iuʔiʔia ʔe ntesi mia ʦi ʦeonɨ miʦu atavei smoftoŋɨ ta fatu ho ho oefɨʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 因此,他在腳踏車上,沒有仔細看路,最後撞到石頭掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, while on the bike, the way/road was not carefully taken care of. Finally (he) bumped into a stone, and fell (down).

S.TRANSL: Therefore, while on the bike, the way/road was not carefully taken care of. Finally bumped into a stone, and fell .

S.FORM: la a cono ceoa na 'e mo miuhu ci ci na ci nasi.
S.PHON: ɗa a ʦono ʦeoa na ʔe mo miuhu ʦi ʦi na ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: la a cono ceoa na 'e mo miuhu ci ci na ci nasi.
S.PHON: ɗa a ʦono ʦeoa na ʔe mo miuhu ʦi ʦi na ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 梨子灑了一地.
The pears were spilt all over the place/ground.

S.FORM: inemio eh ine ntesi cu akoeva no ucia patmʉta.
S.PHON: inemio eh ine ntesi ʦu akoeva no uʦia patmɨta.
S.FORM: inemio eh ine ntesi cu akoeva no ucia patmʉta.
S.PHON: inemio eh ine ntesi ʦu akoeva no uʦia patmɨta.
S.TRANSL: 那時候,當他想要撿起梨子.
At that time, when he wanted to pick them up,

S.FORM: mo tueu ci mocmo ci 'o'oko ho ihe aiti 'e a'ausna ta mo smopcuku ci ha ci na ci oko.
S.PHON: mo tueu ʦi moʦmo ʦi ʔoʔoko ho ihe aiti ʔe aʔausna ta mo smopʦuku ʦi ha ʦi na ʦi oko.
S.FORM: mo tueu ci mocmo ci 'o'oko ho ihe aiti 'e a'ausna ta mo smopcuku ci ha ci na ci oko.
S.PHON: mo tueu ʦi moʦmo ʦi ʔoʔoko ho ihe aiti ʔe aʔausna ta mo smopʦuku ʦi ha ʦi na ʦi oko.

TRANSL.notes: 其他三個小孩,他們看見那個(男)孩跌下來.

S.TRANSL: 其他三個小孩,他們看見那個 孩跌下來.
Three children, the situation of the fallen child was seen by them.

S.FORM: 'a ihe cu toe toehunga to'usni ho patmʉta 'e nasi ho ivaha sooveia ta khago.
S.PHON: ʔa ihe ʦu toe toehuŋa toʔusni ho patmɨta ʔe nasi ho ivaha sooveia ta kha*o.
S.FORM: 'a ihe cu toe toehunga to'usni ho patmʉta 'e nasi ho ivaha sooveia ta khago.
S.PHON: ʔa ihe ʦu toe toehuŋa toʔusni ho patmɨta ʔe nasi ho ivaha sooveia ta kha*o.
S.TRANSL: 他們一起幫忙檢梨子,梨子又被放回籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: The pears were put back/loaded again into the basket under/by their help(ing) together.

S.TRANSL: The pears were put back/loaded again into the basket under/by their help together.

S.FORM: ine mi nte c'u ina 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko no hahocng hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ine mi nte ʦʔu ina ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko no hahoʦŋ hahoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: ine mi nte c'u ina 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko no hahocng hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ine mi nte ʦʔu ina ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko no hahoʦŋ hahoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 當那三個男孩(與男孩)分開,

S.TRANSL: 當那三個男孩 分開,

TRANSL.notes: When the three boys departed ((each other) with the other child),

S.TRANSL: When the three boys departed with the other child),

S.FORM: eh ihe aiti 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci ceopngu.
S.PHON: eh ihe aiti ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi ʦeopŋu.
S.FORM: eh ihe aiti 'e mo eon ta ceoa ci ceopngu.
S.PHON: eh ihe aiti ʔe mo eon ta ʦeoa ʦi ʦeopŋu.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到一頂帽子在地上.

TRANSL.notes: a hat was seen (by them) laying on the ground/road.

S.TRANSL: a hat was seen laying on the ground/road.

S.FORM: ihecu patmʉta ho faeni ta himnonu ci oko.
S.PHON: iheʦu patmɨta ho faeni ta himnonu ʦi oko.
S.FORM: ihecu patmʉta ho faeni ta himnonu ci oko.
S.PHON: iheʦu patmɨta ho faeni ta himnonu ʦi oko.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)撿起了帽子,還給主人那個小孩.

S.TRANSL: 撿起了帽子,還給主人那個小孩.

TRANSL.notes: It was picked up (by them), and was returned to the owner (child).

S.TRANSL: It was picked up , and was returned to the owner .

W.TRANSL: 助動詞.非主焦-3PL.屬格=完成

S.FORM: eh ina 'e na 'e oko nenusi no mo aveoveoyu ho isi ho ihe to'usni.
S.PHON: eh ina ʔe na ʔe oko nenusi no mo aveoveoju ho isi ho ihe toʔusni.
S.FORM: eh ina 'e na 'e oko nenusi no mo aveoveoyu ho isi ho ihe to'usni.
S.PHON: eh ina ʔe na ʔe oko nenusi no mo aveoveoju ho isi ho ihe toʔusni.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子很高興他們幫他.
The child was somehow grateful that he was helped by them.

S.FORM: ihecu isicu pamacoconi ta nasi 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko.
S.PHON: iheʦu isiʦu pamaʦoʦoni ta nasi ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko.
S.FORM: ihecu isicu pamacoconi ta nasi 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko.
S.PHON: iheʦu isiʦu pamaʦoʦoni ta nasi ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko.
S.TRANSL: 因此,他給每個小孩一個梨子.

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, the three children were each given a pear (by him).

S.TRANSL: Therefore, the three children were each given a pear .

W.TRANSL: 助動詞.非主焦-3PL.屬格=完成
助動詞.非主焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: inemio 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko micu maita'e mo'usnu maica ai ai 'aa ihe cohivi 'e tehe 'e tehe sucaefiza ci 'e tehe mia ci ceonʉ.
S.PHON: inemio ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko miʦu maitaʔe moʔusnu maiʦa ai ai ʔaa ihe ʦohivi ʔe tehe ʔe tehe suʦaefiza ʦi ʔe tehe mia ʦi ʦeonɨ.
S.FORM: inemio 'e mo tueu ci 'o'oko micu maita'e mo'usnu maica ai ai 'aa ihe cohivi 'e tehe 'e tehe sucaefiza ci 'e tehe mia ci ceonʉ.
S.PHON: inemio ʔe mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko miʦu maitaʔe moʔusnu maiʦa ai ai ʔaa ihe ʦohivi ʔe tehe ʔe tehe suʦaefiza ʦi ʔe tehe mia ʦi ʦeonɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩好像不知道要走哪條路.
The three children seemed to have no idea which road they were going to pass,

S.FORM: 'iama te sucaefi to mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova.
S.PHON: ʔiama te suʦaefi to mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova.
S.FORM: 'iama te sucaefi to mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova.
S.PHON: ʔiama te suʦaefi to mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova.

TRANSL.notes: 剛好(他們)經過那個採梨子的人.

S.TRANSL: 剛好 經過那個採梨子的人.
which happen to be the pass-by where the man gathered the pears.

S.FORM: inemio na 'e mo toa na 'e mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova osicu zou cohivi ho ho ihe isi pa'eo'a 'o mo cono khago ci nasi.
S.PHON: inemio na ʔe mo toa na ʔe mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova osiʦu zou ʦohivi ho ho ihe isi paʔeoʔa ʔo mo ʦono kha*o ʦi nasi.
S.FORM: inemio na 'e mo toa na 'e mo toa nasi ci eatatiskova osicu zou cohivi ho ho ihe isi pa'eo'a 'o mo cono khago ci nasi.
S.PHON: inemio na ʔe mo toa na ʔe mo toa nasi ʦi eatatiskova osiʦu zou ʦohivi ho ho ihe isi paʔeoʔa ʔo mo ʦono kha*o ʦi nasi.
S.TRANSL: 採梨子的人好像已經知道一籃梨子不見了.
Then, the pear-gathering man seemed to have learned that one basket of the pears was missing.

W.TRANSL: 助動詞.非主焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: inemio isicu 'aka ta'totohʉngva eainca ma sia na mo meo'eo'i.
S.PHON: inemio isiʦu ʔaka taʔtotohɨŋva eainʦa ma sia na mo meoʔeoʔi.
S.FORM: inemio isicu 'aka ta'totohʉngva eainca ma sia na mo meo'eo'i.
S.PHON: inemio isiʦu ʔaka taʔtotohɨŋva eainʦa ma sia na mo meoʔeoʔi.
S.TRANSL: 那時候他一直想是誰偷走了梨子.

TRANSL.notes: (And) at that time he kept thinking of who might have stolen the pears.

S.TRANSL: at that time he kept thinking of who might have stolen the pears.

W.TRANSL: 助動詞.非主焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: aʉlʉ ne ne osi ta'totohʉngva micu sucaefi 'e mo tueu ci oko ho macoconi.
S.PHON: aɨɗɨ ne ne osi taʔtotohɨŋva miʦu suʦaefi ʔe mo tueu ʦi oko ho maʦoʦoni.
S.FORM: aʉlʉ ne ne osi ta'totohʉngva micu sucaefi 'e mo tueu ci oko ho macoconi.
S.PHON: aɨɗɨ ne ne osi taʔtotohɨŋva miʦu suʦaefi ʔe mo tueu ʦi oko ho maʦoʦoni.
S.TRANSL: 就當他在想的時候,三個小孩剛好經過.

TRANSL.notes: Just when he was thinking, the three children (happened to) passed by,

S.TRANSL: Just when he was thinking, the three children passed by,

S.FORM: na'no kokakaebʉ ho mo mʉpʉtʉ ta ma ta ta nasi.
S.PHON: naʔno kokakaeɓɨ ho mo mɨpɨtɨ ta ma ta ta nasi.
S.FORM: na'no kokakaebʉ ho mo mʉpʉtʉ ta ma ta ta nasi.
S.PHON: naʔno kokakaeɓɨ ho mo mɨpɨtɨ ta ma ta ta nasi.
S.TRANSL: 而且每一位都很高興的手裡拿著一顆梨子.
and each was holding with great joy a pear in hand.

S.FORM: inemio na 'e ina 'e himnonu ta nasi isi cu s'a no o'te cohivi ho eainca no no ko no no koeusi eainca ma asonʉ hin'i co mo meo'eo'i.
S.PHON: inemio na ʔe ina ʔe himnonu ta nasi isi ʦu sʔa no oʔte ʦohivi ho eainʦa no no ko no no koeusi eainʦa ma asonɨ hinʔi ʦo mo meoʔeoʔi.
S.FORM: inemio na 'e ina 'e himnonu ta nasi isi cu s'a no o'te cohivi ho eainca no no ko no no koeusi eainca ma asonʉ hin'i co mo meo'eo'i.
S.PHON: inemio na ʔe ina ʔe himnonu ta nasi isi ʦu sʔa no oʔte ʦohivi ho eainʦa no no ko no no koeusi eainʦa ma asonɨ hinʔi ʦo mo meoʔeoʔi.
S.TRANSL: 梨子的主人已經猜到「或許是他們偷走了梨子」.

TRANSL.notes: The pear-owner must have realized/learned by guessing that they probably stole/have stolen (the pears).

S.TRANSL: The pear-owner must have realized/learned by guessing that they probably stole/have stolen .
